mapper.select:
SELECT qb.id, qb.CODE, qb.NAME, qb.image, qb.create_date, count(ci.id) AS collectionCount, SUM(CASE WHEN ci.question_type = '单选题' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS singleCount, SUM(CASE WHEN ci.question_type = '多选题' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS multipleCount, SUM(CASE WHEN ci.question_type = '判断题' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS judgeCount FROM question_bank qb LEFT JOIN collection_info ci ON qb.id = ci.collection_id WHERE 1 = 1
AND code LIKE CONCAT('%',#{queryFrom.code},'%')
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{queryFrom.name},'%')
ORDER BY qb.create_date DESC
